---
title: "Age_Color_models"
author: "Ore, MJ."
date: "2025-03-20"
output: rmarkdown::github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F)
```

```{r prep data - age differences in color, echo = FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(viridis)

here::i_am("R_scripts/Color_correlations.Rmd")

avg_img <- read.csv(here("data/BTBW_whole_specimen_Image_Analysis_measurements_averaged_allpop.csv"))

## select only brightness for ASY males
age <- avg_img %>% 
  dplyr::select(ID, pl_code, dblMean, dblSD, uvMean, uvSD, area, Age, pop, lat, lon, Year, prepartor) %>% 
  filter(Age == "ASY" | Age == "SY")

age_summarized <- age %>%
  group_by(ID, Age, pop, lat, lon,Year, prepartor, pl_code) %>%
  summarise(
    dblMean = mean(dblMean),
    dblSD = mean(dblSD),
    uvMean = mean(uvMean),
    uvSD = mean(uvSD),
    area = mean(area),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

age_wide <- age_summarized %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = pl_code, values_from = c(dblMean, dblSD, uvMean, uvSD, area), names_sep = "_" )

```

# Crown
```{r crown, echo=F}

t <- t.test(dblMean_c ~ Age, data = age_wide)

pval <- t$p.value
# Calculate means and confidence intervals
summary_stats <- age_wide %>%
  group_by(Age) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(dblMean_c, na.rm = T),
    stdev = sd(dblMean_c, na.rm = T)
  )

# Correct usage of sprintf to create the annotation text with standard deviation
text_annotation <- sprintf("ASY: %.3f ± %.3f, SY: %.3f ± %.3f, p-value: %.3f", summary_stats$mean[1], summary_stats$stdev[1], summary_stats$mean[2], summary_stats$stdev[2],pval)

ggplot(data = age_wide, aes(y = dblMean_c, x = Age)) + 
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.6, position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Mean Luminance of Crown") +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = text_annotation, 
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 5, color = "blue")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    aspect.ratio = 0.75,
    text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

```

# coverts

```{r coverts, echo=F}

t <- t.test(dblMean_o ~ Age, data = age_wide)

pval <- t$p.value
# Calculate means and confidence intervals
summary_stats <- age_wide %>%
  group_by(Age) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(dblMean_o, na.rm = T),
    stdev = sd(dblMean_o, na.rm = T)
  )

# Correct usage of sprintf to create the annotation text with standard deviation
text_annotation <- sprintf("ASY: %.3f ± %.3f, SY: %.3f ± %.3f, p-value: %.3f", summary_stats$mean[1], summary_stats$stdev[1], summary_stats$mean[2], summary_stats$stdev[2],pval)

ggplot(data = age_wide, aes(y = dblMean_o, x = Age)) + 
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.6, position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Mean Luminance of marginal coverts") +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = text_annotation, 
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 5, color = "blue")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    aspect.ratio = 0.75,
    text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

```

#throat

```{r throat, echo=F}

t <- t.test(dblMean_t ~ Age, data = age_wide)

pval <- t$p.value
# Calculate means and confidence intervals
summary_stats <- age_wide %>%
  group_by(Age) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(dblMean_t, na.rm = T),
    stdev = sd(dblMean_t, na.rm = T)
  )

# Correct usage of sprintf to create the annotation text with standard deviation
text_annotation <- sprintf("ASY: %.3f ± %.3f, SY: %.3f ± %.3f, p-value: %.3f", summary_stats$mean[1], summary_stats$stdev[1], summary_stats$mean[2], summary_stats$stdev[2],pval)

ggplot(data = age_wide, aes(y = dblMean_t, x = Age)) + 
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.6, position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Mean Luminance of Throat") +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = text_annotation, 
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 5, color = "blue")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    aspect.ratio = 0.75,
    text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

```

# dorsum
```{r dorsum, echo=F}
t <- t.test(dblMean_d ~ Age, data = age_wide)

pval <- t$p.value
# Calculate means and confidence intervals
summary_stats <- age_wide %>%
  group_by(Age) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(dblMean_d, na.rm = T),
    stdev = sd(dblMean_d, na.rm = T)
  )

# Correct usage of sprintf to create the annotation text with standard deviation
text_annotation <- sprintf("ASY: %.3f ± %.3f, SY: %.3f ± %.3f, p-value: %.3f", summary_stats$mean[1], summary_stats$stdev[1], summary_stats$mean[2], summary_stats$stdev[2],pval)


ggplot(data = age_wide, aes(y = dblMean_d, x = Age)) + 
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.6, position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Mean Luminance of Dorsum") +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = text_annotation, 
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 5, color = "blue")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    aspect.ratio = 0.75,
    text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )


```

#belly
```{r belly, echo=F}

t <- t.test(dblMean_b ~ Age, data = age_wide)

pval <- t$p.value
# Calculate means and confidence intervals
summary_stats <- age_wide %>%
  group_by(Age) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(dblMean_b, na.rm = T),
    stdev = sd(dblMean_b, na.rm = T)
  )

# Correct usage of sprintf to create the annotation text with standard deviation
text_annotation <- sprintf("ASY: %.3f ± %.3f, SY: %.3f ± %.3f, p-value: %.3f", summary_stats$mean[1], summary_stats$stdev[1], summary_stats$mean[2], summary_stats$stdev[2],pval)

ggplot(data = age_wide, aes(y = dblMean_b, x = Age)) + 
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.6, position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Mean Luminance of Belly") +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = text_annotation, 
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 5, color = "blue")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    aspect.ratio = 0.75,
    text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )


```

# wingspot
```{r wingspot lum, echo=F}

t <- t.test(dblMean_w ~ Age, data = age_wide)

pval <- t$p.value

# Calculate means and confidence intervals
summary_stats <- age_wide %>%
  group_by(Age) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(dblMean_w, na.rm = T),
    stdev = sd(dblMean_w, na.rm = T)
  )

# Correct usage of sprintf to create the annotation text with standard deviation
text_annotation <- sprintf("ASY: %.3f ± %.3f, SY: %.3f ± %.3f, p-value: %.3f", summary_stats$mean[1], summary_stats$stdev[1], summary_stats$mean[2], summary_stats$stdev[2],pval)

ggplot(data = age_wide, aes(y = dblMean_w, x = Age)) + 
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.6, position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Mean Luminance of wingspot (brightness)") +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = text_annotation, 
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 5, color = "blue")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    aspect.ratio = 0.75,
    text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

```


```{r wingspot area}

t <- t.test(area_w ~ Age, data = age_wide)


pval <- t$p.value
# Calculate means and confidence intervals
summary_stats <- age_wide %>%
  group_by(Age) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(area_w, na.rm = T),
    stdev = sd(area_w, na.rm = T)
  )

# Correct usage of sprintf to create the annotation text with standard deviation
text_annotation <- sprintf("ASY: %.3f ± %.3f, SY: %.3f ± %.3f, p-value: %.3f", summary_stats$mean[1], summary_stats$stdev[1], summary_stats$mean[2], summary_stats$stdev[2],pval)


ggplot(data = age_wide, aes(y = area_w, x = Age)) + 
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.6, position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Area of wingspot (mm2)") +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = text_annotation, 
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 5, color = "blue")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    aspect.ratio = 0.75,
    text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )


```
